how_desc: An invisible transition for your operations, an immediate impact on your turnover.
int_step_desc: Connect your store (Shopify, WooCommerce, RiseManager) in a few clicks via our API or our native plugins.
rec_step_desc: Each new order is instantly synchronized and assigned to one of our available agents.
conf_step_desc: Our experts call your customers in less than 15 min to validate details and purchase intention.
follow_step_desc: In case of call failure, we activate multi-channel reminders (WhatsApp, SMS, Voice AI) to lose nothing.
deli_step_desc: Your confirmed orders are marked in your system, ready for high-success shipping.
Suivez chaque appel in direct depuis vot: Follow every call live from your interface.
dashboard_call_desc: No need to call your agents. The RiseConfirm dashboard centralizes audio recordings, cancellation reasons, and net ROI generated.
faq_q1: How does RiseConfirm connect to my store?
faq_a1: We have native integrations for Shopify, WooCommerce and the Rise ecosystem. For other platforms, we use our API or webhooks. Installation usually takes less than 10 minutes.
faq_q2: Do you offer agents who speak multiple languages?
faq_a2: Yes, all our agents are fluent in Arabic (local dialect and classical) and French. They are trained to adapt to your customer typology for maximum proximity.
faq_q3: Is there a minimum of orders per day?
faq_a3: No, we support both beginners and large volumes. However, some pricing plans are more advantageous depending on your monthly volume.
faq_q4: Can I customize the call scripts?
faq_a4: Absolutely. During onboarding, we define with you the tone of voice, selling points and even upsell strategies so that the agents are the exact extension of your brand.
faq_q5: How can I track call performance?
faq_a5: You have access to a real-time dashboard that shows you the number of calls made, the confirmation rate, the reasons for refusal and even the ROI generated by our service.
faq_q6: What happens if a customer is unreachable?
faq_a6: We have a strict callback policy (up to 3 attempts at different times of the day). In case of failure, an automatic WhatsApp or SMS message is sent to invite the customer to confirm their order.
faq_q7: Do you offer a free trial?
faq_a7: Yes, we offer a 7-day trial period or your first 50 free confirmed orders to allow you to measure the direct impact on your delivery rate.
